title: On The Vowels
content:
We are little airy creatures,
    All of different voice and features;
    One of us in glass is set,
    One of us you'll find in jet.
    T'other you may see in tin,
    And the fourth a box within.
    If the fifth you should pursue,
    It can never fly from you.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Jonathan Swift, titled "On The Vowels", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
